ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "cname_with_subdomain" TEXT /* CNAME configuration with subdomain used for tracking */,
  "cname" TEXT /* Base CNAME used for tracking */,
  "tracker_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the tracking service (e.g., Adobe, Plausible Analytics) */,
  "website_owner" TEXT /* Name of the website owner or company */,
  "website_category" TEXT /* Category or niche of the website */,
  "website_description" TEXT /* Short description of the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trackers" (
  "tracker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking setup */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website associated with this tracking configuration */,
  "number_of_trackers" INTEGER /* Number of tracking instances configured on the website */,
  "tracker_name" TEXT /* Name of the tracking configuration */,
  "tracker_type" TEXT /* Type of tracking (e.g., page view, click, conversion) */,
  "tracker_description" TEXT /* Short description of the tracking configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trackers_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracker_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the tracking provider */,
  "provider_description" TEXT /* Short description of the tracking provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website associated with this traffic entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic entry */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors */,
  "bounce_rate" TEXT /* Bounce rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website associated with this engagement entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement entry */,
  "time_on_site" TEXT /* Average time on site */,
  "pages_per_session" TEXT /* Average pages per session */,
  "goal_completion_rate" TEXT /* Goal completion rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website associated with this conversion entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion entry */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)
